description.value: All creatures in cone make Will saves. Compare your targeting successes to each target's save successes. Based on net successes: 1 = Frightened, 2 = Fleeing, 3+ = Cowering. Creatures can make saves at end of turn to downgrade/end (1 success downgrades or ends).

system.effect: All creatures in cone make Will saves. Compare your targeting successes to each target's save successes. Based on net successes: 1 = Frightened, 2 = Fleeing, 3+ = Cowering. Creatures can make saves at end of turn to downgrade/end (1 success downgrades or ends).
system.targetingSuccessScaling: 0 = Fails, 1 = Frightened (1 round), 2 = Frightened (1 minute), 3 = Fleeing (1 minute)
system.weavingRoll: Negative Potential + Negative Mastery / Space Potential + Space Mastery
